mixStrategy: This Electronic/House focus track is built around a steady i→bVI→bVII→i progression in Am (Am→F→G→Am), cycling every 6.4 seconds (8 beats at 75 BPM). The mix is carefully stratified: BASS (Synth Bass, 20-300Hz) anchors the low end with a pumping root-octave pattern on A1/A2, F1/F2, G1/G2, locking tightly to the kick drum on every beat. CHORDS (Warm Pad, 300Hz-2kHz) fill the harmonic body with sustained minor/major voicings in the C3-C5 range, providing a lush bed that moves slowly, creating a hypnotic wash. MELODY (Sawtooth Lead, 1-8kHz) sits above in C4-C6, playing arpeggiated 16th-note synth patterns that outline chord tones on strong beats with scalar passing tones between. DRUMS (full spectrum, rhythmic) provide the four-on-floor pulse: kick every beat (95 vel), clap on 2&4 (80 vel), closed hi-hats on 8ths (45-60 vel). Energy arc: segments 1-2 (0-15s) build from 0.4→0.6 with bass+drums introducing, then chords entering; segments 3-5 (15-37.5s) sustain 0.7 energy with all elements active and melody fully present; segment 6 (37.5-45s) drops to 0.5 with melody thinning and velocity reducing. Rhythmic interlock: bass hits lock with kick on downbeats, melody patterns breathe on the offbeats between hi-hat hits. All tracks change chords together at the same beat boundaries. The result is a steady, predictable, habituating electronic pulse ideal for focus.
